name: SEC EDGAR
description: Provide AI assistants with real-time access to official SEC EDGAR filings and financial data. Enab
longDescription: SEC EDGAR MCP server for accessing US securities filings. Search 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K filings, extract financial statements, get insider trading data, and access structured XBRL financial data with exact numeric precision.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: Get the MD&A section from this 10-Q
Show me Microsoft's revenue over the last 4 quarters
What insider transactions occurred at Tesla recently?
